blockers.description: Resend credentials (RESEND_API_KEY + RESEND_FROM_EMAIL) not yet provisioned — blocks UAT-3 email delivery verification
blockers.workaround: UAT-1 and UAT-2 can be completed independently on Vercel Preview once Turnstile + Sheets creds are in place

blockers.description: Pre-existing React 19 SSR 'Invalid hook call' warning in wizard hydration path blocks 3 of 5 Playwright E2E specs from running the full submit flow
blockers.workaround: Manual browser verification covers the gap. Phase 5 owns the @hookform/resolvers v3→v5 migration that resolves this.

human_actions_pending.action: Meet with client to obtain Resend API credentials
human_actions_pending.context: Client needs to provision/share RESEND_API_KEY + RESEND_FROM_EMAIL for Vercel Preview environment. This unblocks UAT-3.

human_actions_pending.action: Provision Vercel Preview env vars: PUBLIC_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY, TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY, GOOGLE_SHEETS_CREDENTIALS_JSON, GOOGLE_SHEETS_LEAD_SHEET_ID, CRON_SECRET, RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET, RESEND_API_KEY, RESEND_FROM_EMAIL
human_actions_pending.context: All 8 env vars are registered in src/env.d.ts and .env.example but need actual values in Vercel Preview before UAT can run end-to-end.

human_actions_pending.action: Run the 3 UAT items on Vercel Preview and record results in 03-HUMAN-UAT.md

decisions.decision: Accept rate-limit timing-distinguishable response (CR-02) as intentional design
decisions.rationale: Real users hitting rate limit SHOULD see 'too many attempts' error, not silent success — the silent-decoy contract applies only to honeypot/min-time/URL-in-notes gates, not to rate limiting.

decisions.decision: Use @react-email/render + comment-stripping substring tests instead of snapshot tests
decisions.rationale: Snapshots would couple to React's internal HTML comment insertion behavior; substring matching is resilient to renderer updates.
radix-nova style registry ships empty form.json; hand-authored file matches default shadcn semantics but uses repo's unified radix-ui import convention.

decisions.decision: Add zodResolver shim in src/lib/forms/ bridging Zod v4 .issues → @hookform/resolvers@3.x .errors expectation
decisions.rationale: @hookform/resolvers v5 supports Zod v4 natively but changes useForm generic inference; broader refactor deferred.

next_action: After client meeting: provision Resend creds in Vercel Preview, run the 3 UAT items in 03-HUMAN-UAT.md, then run /gsd-verify-work 3 to flip phase status to passed.
context_notes: Phase 3 is code-complete and test-green (177/177 unit + integration tests passing). All launch-blocker code-review findings are fixed. The only thing standing between Phase 3 and completion is 3 human-verified UAT items that require live Vercel Preview + client-provided Resend creds. The wizard is live at pnpm dev and renders/navigates correctly in a browser; submit flow needs Preview env because of env-var dependencies (Turnstile, Sheets, Resend).
